announcement.text: Clear skin in as little as 2 weeks —

hero.description: Paramedical skincare backed by 25+ years of medical expertise, European-grade serums, and a proven acne treatment protocol. Real results in as little as 2 weeks.

why.title: A Different Kind of Skincare Practice
why.subtitle: Marta combines medical expertise with personalized care to deliver results that store-bought products can't.

expertise.title: Medical-Grade Expertise
expertise.description: 25+ years of medical background with a B.S. in Biology and A.S. in Lab Sciences. Clinical precision in every consultation.

protocol.title: Certified Acne Protocol
protocol.description: Face Reality certified under Dr. James E. Fulton, the pioneer of Retin-A. A proven system — not guesswork.

european.title: European-Grade Serums
european.description: Premium glass ampule serums from Germany, Spain, Switzerland, and Italy. Concentrated actives unavailable in stores.

botanicals.title: Proprietary Botanicals
botanicals.description: The Radiance Skin Care Line is toxin-free, paraben-free, and sulfate-free. Created by Marta for real skin conditions.

personalized.title: Personalized Regimens
personalized.description: No two skin types are the same. Every client receives a custom treatment roadmap and take-home protocol.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Care
bilingual.description: Fluent in English and Spanish, ensuring every client feels understood and confident in their treatment plan.

services.title: Expert Skincare Treatments
services.subtitle: From clinical acne programs to luxury Korean facials — every treatment is tailored to your unique skin.
services.pageSubtitle: Every treatment is tailored to your unique skin type and concerns. Marta combines 25+ years of medical expertise with cutting-edge protocols for real results.
services.biMonthlyDesc: Includes progress monitoring and an acne facial to prepare your skin for the next phase of treatment.

award.description: 360 Radiance has been recognized as the **Best Skin Care Clinic in Sunrise, Florida** by BusinessRate, powered by Google Reviews. This award reflects the trust, satisfaction, and real results our clients experience every day.
award.footer: Powered by Google Reviews · BusinessRate Verified

about.p1: Marta Nazzar is a licensed Paramedical Aesthetician with a B.S. in Biology and A.S. in Medical & Laboratory Studies from Florida College of Natural Health. Her 25+ years of medical background allow her to merge clinical precision with aesthetic artistry.
about.p2: Certified under renowned acne expert Dr. James E. Fulton through the Face Reality program, Marta evaluates diverse skin types to determine the best solution for each individual. She created the Radiance Skin Care Line — botanical formulas free of toxins, parabens, and sulfates.
about.pageSubtitle: 25+ years of medical expertise, a deep passion for skincare science, and a commitment to results that change lives.
about.bioHeading: From Medical Science to Skincare Artistry
